summary: Iteration 38: Testing PSP Compound/Batch Settlement feature. All backend and frontend tests PASSED. The feature allows users to select multiple pending PSP transactions via checkboxes and create ONE lump sum settlement to treasury.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/psp-summary returns pending_transactions_count and pending_amount
Backend: GET /api/psp/{psp_id}/pending-transactions returns transactions with created_at for Tx Date column
Backend: POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/settle-batch rejects empty transaction list (400)
Backend: POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/settle-batch rejects invalid PSP ID (404)
Backend: POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/settle-batch rejects transactions from wrong PSP (400)
Backend: POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/settle-batch creates compound settlement with correct totals
Backend: Compound settlement marks all selected transactions as settled
Backend: Treasury account credited with lump sum net amount
Backend: Settlement history shows compound settlements with transaction_count and transaction_ids
Frontend: PSP page loads correctly with PSP cards
Frontend: PSP detail dialog opens on card click
Frontend: Pending Settlements table has checkbox column with select-all in header
Frontend: Pending Settlements table has 'Tx Date' column showing transaction created_at date
Frontend: Selecting transactions shows batch action bar at bottom
Frontend: Batch action bar displays: count, Gross, Deductions, Net totals
Frontend: Batch action bar has 'Clear' and 'Settle Selected (N)' buttons
Frontend: Clicking 'Settle Selected' opens Compound Settlement confirmation dialog
Frontend: Compound Settlement dialog shows breakdown (Gross, Commission, Reserve Fund, Net to Treasury)
Frontend: Compound Settlement dialog has Destination Treasury Account selector with PSP default pre-selected
Frontend: Select-all checkbox toggles all transaction checkboxes on/off
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 3806-3950: BatchSettleRequest model and settle-batch endpoint correctly implemented with proper validation, compound settlement creation, treasury crediting, and transaction marking
PSPs.js lines 86-89: selectedSettleTxIds state, batchSummary calculation implemented correctly
PSPs.js lines 468-528: toggleSettleTx/toggleAllSettleTx functions and handleBatchSettle API call working
PSPs.js lines 1050-1064: Table headers include checkbox column and 'Tx Date' column
PSPs.js lines 1224-1253: Batch settle action bar with summary totals and buttons implemented
Compound settlement dialog at lines 1457-1507 shows full breakdown and treasury selector

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified via Playwright screenshots)

seed_data_creation: Created test transactions TEST_BATCH_SETTLE_UI_* for UI testing, consumed by backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSP Compound/Batch Settlement feature fully working. Key behaviors: (1) GET /api/psp/{psp_id}/pending-transactions includes created_at for Tx Date column, (2) POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/settle-batch creates ONE compound settlement record, marks transactions as settled, credits treasury with lump sum, (3) Frontend checkbox column allows multi-select with select-all, (4) Batch action bar shows at bottom with totals when transactions selected, (5) Compound Settlement dialog shows breakdown and allows destination treasury selection. The 'network' PSP (psp_a12648489a08) was used for testing.
